task_completion.description: Verify unauthorized users were removed from #finance-confidential
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the members pane or list for the #finance-confidential channel. Verify that 'contractor.davis' and 'intern.patel' are NOT in the list. The list should only contain authorized members (admin, compliance.officer, finance.director).

task_completion.description: Verify #hr-confidential was converted to a private channel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the left sidebar or the channel header for 'hr-confidential'. It must display a lock icon (indicating a private channel) instead of a hashtag icon (#).

task_completion.description: Verify per-room retention policy is configured for #finance-confidential
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Prune Messages' or 'Retention' settings modal for #finance-confidential. 'Automatically prune old messages' must be enabled, 'Maximum message age in days' set to 365, and 'Do not prune pinned messages' must be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify global file upload settings are updated to policy standards
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Administration > Workspace > Settings > File Upload. 'Maximum File Upload Size (in bytes)' must be exactly 10485760. 'Accepted Media Types' must contain a comma-separated list of image, pdf, and office document MIME types (e.g., image/jpeg, application/pdf, etc.).

task_completion.description: Verify Omnichannel is enabled and the Compliance Reports department is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Omnichannel Administration > Departments screen. A department named 'Compliance Reports' must exist. If the department details are shown, verify the email is 'compliance.reports@company.internal' and 'compliance.officer' is listed as an agent.

task_completion.description: Verify the remediation log channel is created with the pinned report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a private channel named 'compliance-remediation-log-q1-2026' (lock icon). Inside, there must be a structured report message detailing the 4 findings (CA-001, CA-002, DR-001, IR-001) that is PINNED (indicated by a pin icon or visible in the pinned messages pane). The channel members should include ciso, compliance.officer, and legal.counsel.

task_completion.description: Verify a status update was posted in #executive-updates
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the #executive-updates channel. There must be a recent message from the admin confirming that the compliance remediations are complete.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Rocket.Chat web interface in a browser, indicating the agent used the GUI to perform the remediations rather than relying solely on terminal API commands.

integrity.description: Verify interaction with the actual Rocket.Chat application
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings, channels, and messages should appear within the standard Rocket.Chat UI, not in a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify no obvious DOM manipulation was used to fake results
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements (fonts, alignment, colors) should look consistent with standard Rocket.Chat. There should be no obvious signs of HTML/DOM tampering to fake the settings or messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Task requires remediating 4 specific findings in Rocket.Chat:
1. CA-001: Remove 'contractor.davis' and 'intern.patel' from #finance-confidential.
2. CA-002: Convert #hr-confidential to a private channel (must have a lock icon).
3. DR-001: In #finance-confidential, enable message pruning, set max age to 365 days, and check 'exclude pinned messages'. In Admin > File Upload, set Max File Size to 10485760 bytes and Accepted Media Types to 'image/jpeg,image/png,image/gif,application/pdf,application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document,application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet,application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation'.
4. IR-001: Enable Omnichannel, create department 'Compliance Reports' (email: compliance.reports@company.internal), and assign 'compliance.officer' as an agent.
Finally, create private channel 'compliance-remediation-log-q1-2026' with members ciso, compliance.officer, legal.counsel, post and pin a remediation report there, and post a status update in #executive-updates.
